# .github/required-checks.txt
# Canonical list of required GitHub check-context names for branch protection rulesets.
# Used by plugins/dso/scripts/onboarding/provision-ruleset.sh to configure
# the main branch required status checks via the GitHub API.
#
# Format: one check-context name per non-comment line.
# Check-context names must match EXACTLY the "name:" field in the workflow job
# (GitHub uses job name, not job id, as the check context).
#
# Scope: THIS REPO ONLY. Only checks that this repo's own CI workflows emit
# are listed here. Consuming-project checks from ci-dso-staged.yml (lint-format,
# tests, tests-pipefail-strict, validate-ci) are NOT included — those check
# contexts never run in this repo. This repo's ci.yml includes an llm-review
# job that dogfoods the same LLM review gate used in the consuming-project template.
#
# Ownership:
#   ci.yml                     — Actionlint, ShellCheck, Lint Python (ruff), Hook Tests,
#                                Script Tests, LLM Review
#   ticket-platform-matrix.yml — Ticket tests (linux-bash4), Ticket tests (macos-bash3),
#                                Ticket tests (alpine-busybox)

# ── ci.yml checks ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Actionlint
ShellCheck
Lint Python (ruff)
Hook Tests
Script Tests
LLM Review

# ── ticket-platform-matrix.yml checks ────────────────────────────────────────
Ticket tests (linux-bash4)
Ticket tests (macos-bash3)
Ticket tests (alpine-busybox)
